title: Creative Fly Mod
description: Customizable client-side flight with profiles, speed controls, and server opt-in protection.
body:
# Creative Fly Mod

Creative Fly Mod is a client-side flight utility for Minecraft 1.21.1 (NeoForge) with fast movement, profile-based speed control, and in-game configuration.

## Features
- Arm/disarm flight mode with a keybind
- Double-tap Space to toggle active flight (when armed)
- 3 editable speed profiles:
  - Rename each profile
  - Set custom speed with a slider
  - Switch instantly by keybind
  - Cycle profiles forward/backward
- In-game Profiles menu with active profile selection
- Auto-arm on world join option (default enabled)
- HUD feedback:
  - Armed/disarmed status
  - Profile switched message (name + speed %)
  - Live speed display while flying
- Smart speed reset:
  - Press `R` to reset to default
  - Press `R` again to restore previous speed

## Multiplayer / Compliance
**Server-side opt-in is required for multiplayer movement features.**  
If the server has not opted in, flight/speed movement features are blocked in multiplayer.

## Important
**⚠️ Do not use this on multiplayer servers unless the server explicitly opts in.**

## Compatibility
- Minecraft: `1.21.1`
- Loader: `NeoForge`
- Type: `Client-side`
